title: Bobi Mod
description: It adds 3 new ores to the game.The bobi ore spawned in the end,Alex ore-spawned in the nether and Nikola ore-in overworld.Adds tools to the game that are balanced.
body:
This mod adds 3 new ores to the game.They are Bobi ore-spawned in the end,Alex ore-spawned in the nether,and Nikola Ore-spawned in the overworld.It also adds a new totem(GodMaster) that has a few lives before breaking.I've listed some crafting recipes in images.
if you like this mod,consider buying me a cofee at https://buymeacoffee.com/sashko_pro.
I also want to give credits to the creator of Furfsky Reborn inspiring me to make the mod and textures.
REQUIRES FABRIC API FOR FABRIC VERSIONS!
